name: trollii
description: Smart meal planning, budget tracking, and shopping lists

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:build: npm run cap:sync && npx cap build ios
scripts.android:build: npm run cap:sync && npx cap build android
